text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcElementField t
JOIN dbo.hcElementType et ON et.id = t.hcElementTypeId
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFormField ff ON ff.hcElementFieldId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.hcForm f ON f.id = ff.hcFormId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    et.accountInfoId = a.ID OR 
    f.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
   /** (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    )
    AND 
    **/
    (et.isdefault = 0 OR et.accountInfoId IS NOT NULL);  -- Avoid removing shared global fields
